About 📝

Hello 👋

I'm Omar Alqahtani,
but you can call me MQ!

Senior Manager, Experience Design at Jeel (a subsidiary of Riyad Bank), based in Riyadh. I lead UX strategy and digital product design, establishing KPIs, guiding cross-functional teams, and accelerating delivery through AI-enabled prototyping. Previously Associate Manager, Customer Experience at Sutherland and UX Consultant at IBM Consulting.

Certified by

Good Design is good business.
-Thomas J. Watson Jr.
